task: Smoke test codex-subagents-simple with three tiny workers that each write one markdown file under .agent_cache.
acceptanceCriteria: Each subagent writes exactly one owned markdown file
Each markdown file contains Hello, world and a unique worker id
The runner emits per-agent JSON result files and a summary.md

subagents.name: hello-alpha
subagents.mission: Create the alpha smoke markdown file with a single Hello, world message and a unique id.
extraInstructions: Write only your owned markdown file.
Include a unique id string for alpha.

subagents.name: hello-beta
subagents.mission: Create the beta smoke markdown file with a single Hello, world message and a unique id.
extraInstructions: Write only your owned markdown file.
Include a unique id string for beta.

subagents.name: hello-gamma
subagents.mission: Create the gamma smoke markdown file with a single Hello, world message and a unique id.
extraInstructions: Write only your owned markdown file.
Include a unique id string for gamma.
